reviewMethod: Every original 320x200 indexed PNG was directly inspected; a true-color diagnostic conversion was used only to work around the review UI's indexed-image delta-preview artifact. Original indexed bytes were independently checked from PNG signature through chunk CRC, IDAT inflation, scan filters, palette, and exact 64000-byte SQL frame identity.

observations.review: Coherent E1M1 grate-and-corridor world view with the pistol centered below the crosshair. The weapon ends above the 168 HUD boundary; AMMO 050, HEALTH 100, ARMOR 025, keys, labels, and face/status patches are legible and bounded without overlap.

The shotgun replaces only the lower-center weapon region while the same world remains coherent. The HUD correctly switches current ammo to shells 008; all HUD text stays within rows 168-199 and no transparent weapon holes erase the world.
A centered red PAUSE patch occupies only x=126..193 and y=4..17 over the intact game canvas. Its transparent holes preserve the ceiling, and it does not collide with the weapon or HUD.

The full Freedoom menu artwork is intact, all four option labels are centered and readable, and the small blue selector is aligned with NEW GAME. Copyright/version text remains clipped inside the lower corners.

The same menu background and labels remain byte-stable outside the selector. The blue selector moves to CHOOSE SKILL LEVEL; the 70 changed pixels are bounded to x=54..60 and y=80..134 across the old/new cursor positions.

Relational E1M1 linework fills the play area above the unchanged HUD, with a distinct nine-pixel player marker near the west-side spawn. Lines are continuous, aligned, and canvas-bounded with no browser-projected geometry.

FULL mode preserves the normal automap and player marker while revealing exactly 55 additional hidden-line pixels bounded to x=90..252 and y=41..104. The HUD remains intact and identical below row 168.

A complete intermission backdrop carries centered ENTERING, KILLS, SCRT, and TIME rows with bounded red numeric values. Text is readable with no clipping, overlap, transparent holes, or world/HUD leakage.

The intact game view exposes the hidden HUD variations: AMMO 009, HEALTH 037, ARMOR 025, and the blue-key marker. All 753 changed pixels stay within x=18..245 and y=171..186, leaving the world and weapon untouched.

pistolToShotgun.reason: weapon silhouette plus selected-ammo HUD field

quality: APPROVED: no transpose, tears, unintended bands, palette corruption, clipping failures, missing lower layers, or presentation overlap in any reviewed frame.
